signals.raw: No April-specific data releases (e.g., GDP, CPI) or Powell announcements confirmed today.** Prior items like the April 1 speech are >3 weeks old and already digested; tariffs' inflationary impact is persistent but not newly resolved. Goldman Sachs estimates note ~1% inflation rise from H2 2025 to H1 2026 under current regime.[6] Prediction markets likely stable absent real-time triggers.

signals.headline: BITCOIN, XRP, AND SOLANA RALLY IN APRIL | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
BITCOIN, XRP, AND SOLANA RALLY IN APRIL | YES | HIGH confidence**

Bitcoin, XRP, and Solana are experiencing gains in April 2026.[1] Bitcoin is trading at $73,792.90, up 3.0%, while XRP has climbed 4.0% to $1.48 and Solana has gained 6.3% to $93.84.[2] The total cryptocurrency market capitalization has increased to $2.59 trillion, reflecting renewed buying activity across the sector.[2]

signals.headline: **IMF forecast (pre-April 2026)**: Projects U
signals.raw: **IMF forecast (pre-April 2026)**: Projects U.S. core PCE inflation at 2.6% by end-2026 (up from 2.9% in 2025), GDP growth at 2.4% for 2026, and minimal Fed rate cuts (3.6% to 3.4%), citing tariffs (7-8.5% effective rate) pushing goods prices higher while services cool; warns of energy risks from Iran conflict delaying 2% target.[1]
